queue.summary: FOUND AND FIXED BUG: SelfAttention.forward() mutated input matrix in-place, corrupting backward pass gradients. Fixed by caching original sequences. Added 42 stress tests (31 autograd + 11 attention). All passing, pushed to main.

queue.summary: FOUND AND FIXED BUG: LayerNorm.backward() was using simplified gradient ignoring mean/variance cross-terms (50-80% error). Fixed with full backward formula. Also verified Conv2D and MaxPool2D backward correctness (both pass). Added 14 stress tests.

queue.task: Continue neural-net bug hunt: check LSTM/GRU backward, BatchNorm backward, and Diffusion backward for numerical gradient correctness.
queue.summary: FOUND AND FIXED BUG #3: TransformerEncoderBlock backward only kept last position gradient for FF layers (Dense.backward assigns, not accumulates). queue.task: Check CapsuleNet, KAN, and sparse-attention for backward bugs. These all have simplified/approximate comments.
queue.summary: FOUND AND FIXED BUG #4: CapsuleNet squash gradient was identity (completely wrong). Implemented proper Jacobian-vector product. Verified KAN backward is correct (uses proper finite differences). Added 4 stress tests.

queue.summary: Full test suite: 1200 tests, 0 failures. All 5 CI runs pass (green). Last failure was Apr 14; CI is now fixed.

queue.summary: Reviewed VAE, GAN, DQN — no bugs found. These modules have correct implementations. 5 bugs total found and fixed this session (SelfAttention mutation, LayerNorm backward, TransformerBlock FF gradient, CapsuleNet squash, Adam NaN).

queue.summary: THINK: RISC-V TCO already handles direct self-recursion. To extend: (1) general tail call = replace jal+epilogue+ret with epilogue+j, applicable to any function call in return position. (2) IIFE = detect fn(params){body}(args) pattern, inline the body directly. Both are codegen-level transforms.
